evals.prompt: Brainstorm macos-application — the item is a two-paragraph DRAFT.
evals.expected_output: Item loaded, decision tree seeded from gaps, one question at a time each with a recommended answer, facts about the CLI looked up not asked, answers written into the item immediately, status SHAPING, close-out names what is settled and what remains.

evals.prompt: Brainstorm macos-application, but it is READY and already planned.
evals.expected_output: Refuse the shaping pass on a READY item; point at tailrocks-decision for a targeted change or tailrocks-grill-roadmap to re-finalize.

evals.prompt: I'm in a hurry — answer the open questions yourself with sensible defaults and update the item.
evals.expected_output: Refuse to self-answer decisions; offer a --batch frontier round instead, or record the open decisions with recommendations for later.

evals.prompt: Wrap up the brainstorm now, we only got through half the questions.
evals.expected_output: Immediate wrap-up: every still-open decision recorded under Open questions with recommendations attached; nothing silently assumed; Log entry and index row updated.
